title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 205.550 - Special taxes for hospital collected as township taxes
text:
205.550.  Special taxes for hospital collected as township taxes. — The taxes authorized and provided by the terms of sections 205.460 to 205.570 shall be levied against the township or townships forming the hospital district and collected in the same manner as the regular township taxes are levied and collected.
(RSMo 1939 § 15219) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 14002
